query: Tavily tavily.com homepage positioning product features
answer: Tavily positions as a fast, developer-friendly tool for engineering teams.

results.title: Tavily - The issue tracker for modern software teams
results.snippet: Tavily is purpose-built for software development teams who want speed without complexity. Designed for teams that ship fast.

results.title: Why teams choose Tavily
results.snippet: Tavily focuses on developer experience, keyboard-first workflows, and tight Git integrations to reduce friction.
